untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition (AADT type identification), height dimension classification (Tall vs Short), and width dimension classification (Narrow vs Wide based on median length) cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. These require visual pattern detection and custom pattern measurement logic not available in the standard indicator set. Specific performance metrics by market direction and pattern dimensions are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be operationalized.
translation_notes: Signal is primarily a chart pattern recognition rule that depends on manual identification of AADT pattern type and dimensional analysis. The only quantifiable element is volume strength ~1 month post-breakout. Entry/exit conditions use pivot-based reversal as a placeholder, but true implementation requires pattern detection algorithms. Bull/Bear market context provided but specific success rates and performance thresholds are not disclosed in source material.
